#Notion #Productivity

Notion + personal finance = total money clarity 💰
No skills. No design. No excuses.
10 templates that do all the work 👇

---

1/ ROI Calculation Engine
You bought [TICKER] months ago and still have no idea if you are actually up or down after fees.

Include:
- Total return per position
- Unrealized gain or loss
- Cost basis tracking
- Return percentage
- Auto-updated figures

---

2/ 8-Database Wealth System
Your stocks, bills, goals, and budget all live in separate places and never talk to each other.

Give me:
- Portfolio database
- Income and expense logs
- Accounts overview
- Budget and goals linked
- One unified workspace

---

3/ Financial Command Center Dashboard
You open four apps every morning just to get a rough sense of where your money stands.

Build me:
- Portfolio overview panel
- Recent transaction feed
- Net worth snapshot
- Goal progress summary
- Single-glance layout

---

4/ Monthly Spending Blueprint
You hit [MONTH] and have no idea where [AMOUNT] disappeared to this time.

Include:
- Category-level spend targets
- Actual vs budgeted view
- Instant overspend alerts
- Monthly reset structure
- Running balance tracker

---

5/ Financial Goals Tracker
You set a goal to save [AMOUNT] by [DATE] and have not checked your progress since week one.

Give me:
- Progress percentage formula
- Months remaining counter
- Milestone markers
- Priority ranking field
- Auto-updating status

---

6/ Net Worth Snapshot Machine
You have assets in three places and liabilities in two more and no single number to show for it.

Build me:
- Asset category totals
- Liability breakdown
- Net worth formula
- Monthly change tracker
- Historical trend view

---

7/ Investment Portfolio Blueprint
You have positions across [BROKER A] and [BROKER B] and no unified view of your actual allocation.

Include:
- All positions in one table
- Allocation percentage per asset
- Sector or class grouping
- Weight vs target column
- Rebalance flag field

---

8/ Income Stream Tracker
You freelance, invest, and work full-time but never know your true monthly take-home across all sources.

Give me:
- Income source categories
- Monthly total rollup
- Recurring vs one-time flag
- Year-to-date running total
- Source comparison view

---

9/ Expense Audit Engine
You want to cut spending but have no idea which [CATEGORY] is silently draining your account each month.

Build me:
- Expense log with categories
- Monthly subtotals per category
- Largest spend identifier
- Fixed vs variable split
- Linked budget comparison

---

10/ Distribution & Dividend System
You receive payouts from [INVESTMENT] but track them in a notes app and forget half by tax season.

Include:
- Distribution log per holding
- Payment date tracking
- Total received per period
- Reinvested vs withdrawn flag
- Annual income summary

---

That's 10 Notion prompts for personal finance. 💸
Built the template so you don't have to.
Get it for $13 → https://takasoccerfan.gumroad.com/l/glnhwp
